ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "ship_to_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address for the order */,
  "base_price" TEXT /* Base price of the order */,
  "purchased_price" TEXT /* Final purchased price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., On hold, Pending, Closed, Open) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the order was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the order was last updated */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative handling the order */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment for the order */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipped order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_ship_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_to_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("ship_to_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_reps ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer's company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the customer belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the customer record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the customer record was last updated */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a loyalty program the customer is part of */,
  "customer_segment_id" INTEGER /* Segment the customer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "ship_to_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer associated with the shipping address */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the shipping address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the shipping address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the shipping address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the shipping address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the shipping address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the shipping address */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the shipping address was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the shipping address was last updated */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of shipping address (e.g., home, office, etc.) */,
  "address_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_to_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order containing the item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product included in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "subtotal" TEXT /* Subtotal for the item (quantity * unit price) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the order item was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the order item was last updated */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the product record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the product record was last updated */,
  "product_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "product_images" TEXT /* URLs of product images */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the category record was last updated */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category in case of a hierarchical category structure */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* URL of a category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reps" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "sales_rep_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the territory the sales representative covers */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the sales rep record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the sales rep record was last updated */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Hire date of the sales representative */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the sales representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reps_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territories" (
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales territory */,
  "territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales territory */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the territory belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the territory record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the territory record was last updated */,
  "territory_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_territories_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the region record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the region record was last updated */,
  "region_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_changes" (
  "status_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order whose status changed */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the order */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the order */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the status change occurred */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who changed the status */,
  "status_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_changes_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email, in-person meeting) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the interaction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction record was last updated */,
  "interaction_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer for the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales_rep, admin, customer_service) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user record was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role record was last updated */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user assigned the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was assigned */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order history entry */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order whose history is being tracked */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., update, delete, create) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_user" TEXT /* User who performed the action */,
  "action_notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the action */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the history record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the history record was last updated */,
  "action_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
